AdditiveQuadratic.description: Purely additive quadratic; S1=ST exact. Convex for a_i>0, concave for a_i<0.
AdditiveQuadratic.name: AdditiveQuadratic
AdditiveQuadratic.reference: Saltelli et al. (2008), Global Sensitivity Analysis. Wiley.

Borehole.description: Groundwater flow; 2 inputs dominant. No simple closed-form Sobol indices.
Borehole.name: Borehole
Borehole.reference: Harper & Gupta (1983), BMI/ONWI-516; Morris et al. (1993), Technometrics 35(3).

BoussinesqRecession.description: Groundwater recession; exponential/power-law decay. S1 analytically tractable for k=1.
BoussinesqRecession.name: BoussinesqRecession

CSTRReactor.description: CSTR steady-state conversion; Arrhenius nonlinearity. No analytical Sobol indices.
CSTRReactor.name: CSTRReactor

Campbell2D.description: Spatial SA benchmark with analytical V_i(z1,z2); sharp Gaussian ridges and exponential growth terms.
Campbell2D.name: Campbell2D
Campbell2D.reference: Marrel, Iooss, Laurent & Roustant (2011), Environmetrics 22(3):383-397. https://doi.org/10.1002/env.1041

Campbell3D.description: 3D spatial SA benchmark; preserves Campbell2D heterogeneity and backward compatible at z3=0.
Campbell3D.name: Campbell3D

CornerPeak.description: Corner-concentrated; near-zero for large X. Analytical S1 via recursive integral formula.
CornerPeak.name: CornerPeak
CornerPeak.reference: Morokoff & Caflisch (1995), J. Comput. Phys. 122(2). doi:10.1006/jcph.1995.1209

DampedOscillator.description: 2nd-order ODE with harmonic forcing; analytical solution. Temporal output with peak-response analytical Sobol indices.
DampedOscillator.name: DampedOscillator

DetPep8D.description: Curved 8-input function; X1>X2>X3≫rest. No closed-form Sobol indices.
DetPep8D.name: DetPep8D

EnvironModel.description: Pollutant spill in 1D convection-diffusion model. No closed-form Sobol indices.
EnvironModel.name: EnvironModel

EpidemicSIR.description: SIR compartmental model; R0=β/γ governs outbreak. No analytical Sobol indices.
EpidemicSIR.name: EpidemicSIR
EpidemicSIR.reference: Kermack & McKendrick (1927), Proc. R. Soc. A 115(772). doi:10.1098/rspa.1927.0118

ExponentialCampbell2D.description: Exponential-additive 2D spatial benchmark with exact analytic Sobol indices; demonstrates spatial sensitivity variation.
ExponentialCampbell2D.name: ExponentialCampbell2D
ExponentialCampbell2D.reference: Campbell et al. (2011), extended exponential-growth variant; analytical Sobol via sinh(c)/c formula.

Friedman.description: 5 active inputs, 5 pure noise. Analytical variance. Includes nonlinear interaction X1*X2 term.
Friedman.name: Friedman

HeatDiffusion1D.description: 1D Fourier heat equation; analytical Fourier-series solution. Spatial temperature profile output.
HeatDiffusion1D.name: HeatDiffusion1D
HeatDiffusion1D.reference: Carslaw & Jaeger (1959), Conduction of Heat in Solids.

Ishigami.description: Non-linear, non-monotonic; closed-form S1 and ST.
Ishigami.name: Ishigami

LinearModel.description: Additive linear model; analytical S1 = ST = aᵢ²σᵢ²/Var.
LinearModel.name: Linear
LinearModel.reference: Saltelli et al. (2008), Global Sensitivity Analysis.

Lorenz96.description: Chaotic atmospheric toy model; butterfly-effect sensitivity. Inputs are initial conditions; no analytical Sobol indices.
Lorenz96.name: Lorenz96
Lorenz96.reference: Lorenz (1996), ECMWF Seminar on Predictability. Wilks (2005), QJRMS 131(606). doi:10.1256/qj.04.03

LotkaVolterra.description: Predator-prey ODE; nonlinear oscillatory dynamics. No analytical Sobol indices.
LotkaVolterra.name: LotkaVolterra

MoonHerrera.description: Active subspace benchmark; dominant 1-D direction. Analytical S1 via MGF of product-exponential.
MoonHerrera.name: MoonHerrera

Morris.description: Mixed linear/quadratic/interaction; 10 influential inputs. No analytical Sobol indices.
Morris.name: Morris

OTLCircuit.description: Transformer-less push-pull circuit Vm; no analytical S1/ST.
OTLCircuit.name: OTL Circuit

OakleyOHagan.description: 15-input quadratic; analytical S1. Partitioned into linear, quadratic, and interactive inputs.
OakleyOHagan.name: OakleyOHagan

PCETestFunction.description: Legendre PCE expansion; exact S1 via coefficient squares. Interaction structure fully prescribed.
PCETestFunction.name: PCETestFunction

Piston.description: Piston cycle time; no simple analytical S1/ST.
Piston.name: Piston

ProductPeak.description: Interior-peaked product function; analytical S1. Sensitivity concentrated at peak location.
ProductPeak.name: ProductPeak
ProductPeak.reference: Caflisch, Morokoff & Owen (1997), J. Comput. Finance 1(1). Kucherenko et al. (2009), RESS 94(7).

Rosenbrock.description: Narrow parabolic valley; sequential X_i interactions. Non-convex, non-separable.
Rosenbrock.name: Rosenbrock

SobolG.description: Product-form function; analytical S1 and ST. Interaction structure controlled by a_i parameters.
SobolG.name: SobolG
SobolG.reference: Saltelli & Sobol (1995), Rel. Eng. Sys. Safety 50(3). doi:10.1016/0951-8320(95)00099-2

TwoCompartmentPK.description: Two-compartment pharmacokinetics; bi-exponential C(t). Analytical AUC indices available.
TwoCompartmentPK.name: TwoCompartmentPK

WingWeight.description: Aircraft wing weight; 4-5 inputs dominant. No closed-form Sobol indices.
WingWeight.name: WingWeight
WingWeight.reference: Forrester, Sobester & Keane (2008), Engineering Design via Surrogate Models. doi:10.1002/9780470770801
